news_items.summary: Phillies star Bryce Harper said Monday that he did not know how FanDuel would use a personalized video he made for a customer, who has since accused the sportsbook in a lawsuit of taking advantage of his gambling addiction.

news_items.headline: Schwarber to lead off for NL; 3 new AL starters
news_items.summary: The Phillies' Kyle Schwarber will lead off for the NL in the All-Star Game as the replacement for Shohei Ohtani, while Riley Greene, Ben Rice and Cody Bellinger will start for the AL.

news_items.headline: Surging Red Sox cap first 9-0 road trip since '77
news_items.summary: The Red Sox completed a sweep of the Mets with a 3-2 victory on Sunday, marking their first 9-0 road trip since 1977.

news_items.headline: A's fire pitching coach Emerson amid 9-game slide
news_items.summary: The Athletics, who have a nine-game losing streak, have fired pitching coach Scott Emerson, with bullpen coach Dan Hubbs taking over on an interim basis.

news_items.headline: Orioles' Alexander hit by pitch, has fractured han...
news_items.summary: Orioles third baseman Blaze Alexander suffered a non-displaced fracture in his left hand after being hit by a pitch Sunday, manager Craig Albernaz said.

news_items.headline: Marlins pick Japanese slugger Sasaki in 8th round
news_items.summary: The Miami Marlins drafted Japanese slugger Rintaro Sasaki out of Stanford in the eighth round of the amateur draft on Sunday.
